subject: Computer Networking
title: AI and the Future of Email
description: A micro-lesson that makes AI and the Future of Email usable.

hook.text: AI now drafts replies, sorts your inbox, and even attends meetings for you. Email is transforming.

buildup.text: Gmail's Smart Reply suggests three short responses. Smart Compose finishes your sentences as you type.

discovery.text: AI prioritizes your inbox. Important emails surface first. Low-priority ones stay hidden until you're free.

twist.text: AI-generated phishing is harder to detect. Perfect grammar and personal details fool both humans and filters.

climax.text: Microsoft Copilot summarizes long email threads and drafts context-aware replies. The inbox becomes an assistant.

punchline.text: AI is reshaping email. Smarter inbox, smarter threats, new balance.

quiz.question: What is a risk of AI in the email space?
options: AI-generated phishing is harder to detect
AI makes email too fast for servers to handle
AI eliminates the need for email entirely
